title: onopordum tauricum subsp. humile
intro: Onopordum tauricum subsp. humile, also known as Dwarf Cnicus or Woolly Thistle, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Onopordum tauricum subsp. humile include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as potentially lowering blood sugar levels and cholesterol. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction for consumption, and it can also be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
